header.taglineAllNetworks: Search for a domain on all networks

input.importPlaceholder:
You can paste in two formats:

Format 1: Domain with auth code
example.com, authcode123

Format 2: Multiple domains (comma or newline separated)
domain1.com, domain2.com
domain3.com
